# Stocky Fun

> AI-powered crypto trading dashboard with real-time charts and paper trading.

## About

Stocky Fun is a free, browser-based AI-powered cryptocurrency trading dashboard. It provides real-time price charts, AI-generated buy/sell signals, comprehensive technical analysis, and a paper trading simulator — all in one interface.

## Features

- **Real-time Charts**: Live crypto charts via GeckoTerminal and TradingView embeds
- **AI Trading Signals**: Natural language prompts analyzed by Groq LLM to generate buy/sell/hold signals with confidence scores
- **Technical Analysis**: RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic Oscillator, EMA (9/21/200), ATR, Support/Resistance levels
- **Paper Trading**: Simulated trading with real-time PnL tracking, stop loss support, and trade history
- **Multi-Coin Support**: BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB, and HYPE
- **Visual Chart Analysis**: AI-powered visual chart reading via Overshoot.ai screen sharing
- **Signal Scoring**: Composite signal score (-10 to +10) combining multiple technical indicators

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite
- AI: Groq LLM (Llama 3), Overshoot.ai for visual analysis
- Data: CoinGecko API, GeckoTerminal, TradingView
- Deployment: Vercel (serverless)

## URL

https://fun.stockyai.xyz

## Contact

Visit https://fun.stockyai.xyz for the live application.
